pk_tuples.dose_original: approximately 4 g of Arazlo Lotion 0.045% once daily
pk_tuples.notes: Tazarotene (parent) plasma Cmax (pg/mL) on Days 14-15 following 14 days once-daily topical application of Arazlo Lotion 0.045% (~4g, approx 1.8 mg tazarotene) in subjects >=12 years with moderate-to-severe acne; Cmax 4.84 pg/mL, AUC0-t 67.40 h*pg/mL; maximal use PK study V01-123A-501; units converted from pg/mL to ng/mL (/1000)

pk_tuples.dose_original: approximately 4 g of Arazlo Lotion 0.045% once daily
pk_tuples.notes: Tazarotene plasma Cmax in pediatric subjects 9 to <12 years on Days 14-15; Cmax 17.82 pg/mL, AUC0-t 240.98 h*pg/mL; higher systemic exposure than adults likely due to higher SA/V ratio
